restaurant_name: Perimeter Post - Rreal Tacos - Sandy Springs
blurb:
This place absolutely lives up to all the buzz on social media. The atmosphere is vibrant and fun, perfect for girls' night out or when you want good Mexican food with friends. The service is genuinely helpful and they know their menu well.

Start with the Esquite because it's packed with flavor and gets the table sharing. The Pineapple Guava pitcher is refreshing and perfectly balanced between sweet and strong. The vibe is lively but not too loud, and they're open late which is great for weekend dinners that turn into longer nights.
address: 227 Sandy Springs Pl NE #506, Sandy Springs, GA 30328, USA

restaurant_name: Perimeter Post - Hyderabad House Atlanta - Biryani Place
blurb:
This is where I go when I'm craving real Indian food and want generous portions that'll feed the whole family. It's not fancy but the food is authentic, and they serve everything family-style so you can share. Perfect for when you want to introduce the kids to Indian food or need a satisfying weeknight dinner that's different from the usual.

The biryani is their specialty and for good reason. It comes in a huge portion with tender meat and fragrant rice that's actually worth the hype. The colorful, casual setting makes it comfortable for families, and the staff is helpful if you're not sure what to order.
address: 130 Perimeter Center Pl, Dunwoody, GA 30346, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Thursday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Friday: 11:30 AM – 11:30 PM, Saturday: 9:00 AM – 11:30 PM, Sunday: 9:00 AM – 9:30 PM

restaurant_name: Perimeter Post - Ray's on the River
blurb:
This is our go-to for special occasions when we want to impress out-of-town visitors or celebrate something important. The setting right on the Chattahoochee River is gorgeous, especially if you can snag a window table. It's definitely a splurge but worth it for anniversaries, business dinners, or when your parents are visiting.

The Southern seafood here is elevated but not pretentious. Whatever fresh fish they're featuring is usually your best bet, and the service is the kind where they actually remember what you ordered without writing it down. The intimate atmosphere makes it feel special without being stuffy.
address: 6700 Powers Ferry Rd NW, Sandy Springs, GA 30339, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Thursday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM, Friday: 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM, Saturday: 12:00 – 11:00 PM, Sunday: 11:00 AM – 4:00 PM, 5:00 – 9:00 PM

restaurant_name: Perimeter Post - Mister O1 Extraordinary Pizza Sandy Springs
blurb:
I was skeptical about another pizza place until I tried this one. The crust is thin and actually crispy, not floppy like most places around here. It's in the Blue Stone shopping area and perfect for a casual dinner when you want good pizza that's not just okay pizza.

They use ingredients imported from Italy and you can taste the difference. The margherita is simple but done right, and they have creative toppings if you want something different. Good for date nights that aren't too formal or family dinners where everyone can agree on pizza.
address: 6405 Blue Stone Rd Ste 240, Atlanta, GA 30328, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Thursday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM, Friday: 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM, Saturday: 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM, Sunday: 11:30 AM – 9:30 PM

blurb:
My girlfriend insisted I'd love this place for our dinner out and she was absolutely right. This has become one of my top 5 dinner spots in Atlanta. The Persian food is incredible and the cocktails are creative and well-made. Perfect for a special dinner or when you want to try something different.

The chicken shish kabobs with rice with lentils and raisins are amazing, and definitely get the hummus to start. The wings are surprisingly good too. Save room for the tiramisu because it's worth it. The whole experience feels special without being stuffy.
address: 6500 Aria Blvd Suite 500, Sandy Springs, GA 30328, USA
